revision.comment: スタブ
revision.text:
'''丙寅'''（ひのえとら、へいいん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて3番目で、前は[[乙丑]]、次は[[丁卯]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は火、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（木生火）である。
==丙寅の年==
==丙寅の日== ===[[選日]]===

revision.text:
```markdown {{干支}} '''Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle|Heiin]] ```
[[ja:丙寅]]

== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle|Heiin]] [[Category:new pages|Heiin]] ```

```markdown {{干支}} '''Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle|Heiin]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories|Heiin]] [[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] ```
[[ja:丙寅]]

```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Heiin]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories|Heiin]] [[Category:qq---qq|Heiin]] [[Category:qq-Yang Fire Tiger-qq|Heiin]] [[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger}][[Category:qq]] ```
[[ja:丙寅]]

revision.text:
```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Fire Tiger-qq]] [[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] ```

It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. == Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Fire Tiger-qq]] [[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] ```

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "-qq]]" to "—>[[category:qq close]]"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:B" to "[[sn:"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)

== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:new pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pgoodbye $1]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] <!--Yang Fire Tiger-->[[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:qq]] ```

However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)
== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] <!--Yang Fire Tiger-->[[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:Fire Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yang Fire Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[Category:11]] ```

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9)== See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}}
<!--Yang Fire Tiger-->
```

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin}} ```markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
== Years of Heiin == A year is classified as Heiin if its [[Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[6]] *[[66]] *[[126]] *[[186]] *[[246]] *[[306]] *[[366]] *[[426]] *[[486]] *[[546]] *[[606]] *[[666]] *[[726]] *[[786]] *[[846]] *[[906]] *[[966]] | *[[1026]] *[[1086]] *[[1146]] *[[1206]] *[[1266]] *[[1326]] *[[1386]] *[[1446]] *[[1506]] *[[1566]] *[[1626]] *[[1686]] *[[1746]] *[[1806]] *[[1866]] *[[1926]] *[[1986]] | *[[2046]] *[[2106]] *[[2166]] *[[2226]] *[[2286]] *[[2346]] *[[2406]] *[[2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[2946]] |}
== Heiin Months == The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[甲|Kō]] or [[己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
== Heiin Days == === Calendar Annotations (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section Calendar annotations]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} <!--Yang Fire Tiger-->
```
[[cdo:Bîng-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Holt-Tigeri]][[zh-min-nan:Pêng-chún]][[zh-yue:丙寅]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Fire Tiger]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Yang Fire Tiger]] [[en:Yang Fire Tiger]] [[ja:丙寅]] [[zh:丙寅]] [[ko:병인]] [[fr:Tigre de feu]] [[de:Feuer-Tiger]] [[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]] [[de:Feuer-Tigreen]] [[en:Fire Tiger]] [[fr:Tigre de feushak]] [[it:Bing-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ingyinja]] [[vi:Bính Dần]] [[za:Bingceij]] [[ar:Yang Fire Tiger]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q767248]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}} markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: Heiin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongin (병인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần

==Months of Yang Fire Tiger== The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Péng-în]][[zh_yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q767248]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}} markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q767248]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}} markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: Heiin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongin (병인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
<!-- == * Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのえとら (hinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: へいかのとら (heika-no-tora) ***Onyomi: へいいん (heiin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Tiger== A year is classified as Heiin if its [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:6|6]] *[[:en:66|66]] *[[:en:126|126]] *[[:en:186|186]] *[[:en:246|246]] *[[:en:306|306]] *[[:en:366|366]] *[[:en:426|426]] *[[:en:486|486]] *[[:en:546|546]] *[[:en:606|606]] *[[:en:666|666]] *[[:en:726|726]] *[[:en:786|786]] *[[:en:846|846]] *[[:en:906|906]] *[[:en:966|966]] | *[[:en:1026|1026]] *[[:en:1086|1086]] *[[:en:1146|1146]] *[[:en:1206|1206]] *[[:en:1266|1266]] *[[:en:1326|1326]] *[[:en:1386|1386]] *[[:en:1446|1446]] *[[:en:1506|1506]] *[[:en:1566|1566]] *[[:en:1626|1626]] *[[:en:1686|1686]] *[[:en:1746|1746]] *[[:en:1806|1806]] *[[:en:1866|1866]] *[[:en:1926|1926]] *[[:en:1986|1986]] | *[[:en:2046|2046]] *[[:en:2106|2106]] *[[:en:2166|2166]] *[[:en:2226|2226]] *[[:en:2286|2286]] *[[:en:2346|2346]] *[[:en:2406|2406]] *[[:en:2466|2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[:en:2706|2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[:en:2946|2946]] |}
==Months of Yang Fire Tiger== The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q767248]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}} markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: Heiin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongin (병인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
<!-- == * Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのえとら (hinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: へいかのとら (heika-no-tora) ***Onyomi: へいいん (heiin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Tiger== A year is classified as Heiin if its [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:6|6]] *[[:en:66|66]] *[[:en:126|126]] *[[:en:186|186]] *[[:en:246|246]] *[[:en:306|306]] *[[:en:366|366]] *[[:en:426|426]] *[[:en:486|486]] *[[:en:546|546]] *[[:en:606|606]] *[[:en:666|666]] *[[:en:726|726]] *[[:en:786|786]] *[[:en:846|846]] *[[:en:906|906]] *[[:en:966|966]] | *[[:en:1026|1026]] *[[:en:1086|1086]] *[[:en:1146|1146]] *[[:en:1206|1206]] *[[:en:1266|1266]] *[[:en:1326|1326]] *[[:en:1386|1386]] *[[:en:1446|1446]] *[[:en:1506|1506]] *[[:en:1566|1566]] *[[:en:1626|1626]] *[[:en:1686|1686]] *[[:en:1746|1746]] *[[:en:1806|1806]] *[[:en:1866|1866]] *[[:en:1926|1926]] *[[:en:1986|1986]] | *[[:en:2046|2046]] *[[:en:2106|2106]] *[[:en:2166|2166]] *[[:en:2226|2226]] *[[:en:2286|2286]] *[[:en:2346|2346]] *[[:en:2406|2406]] *[[:en:2466|2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[:en:2706|2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[:en:2946|2946]] |}
==Months of Yang Fire Tiger== The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

--> ==Years of Yang Fire Tiger== A year is classified as Heiin if its [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:6|6]] *[[:en:66|66]] *[[:en:126|126]] *[[:en:186|186]] *[[:en:246|246]] *[[:en:306|306]] *[[:en:366|366]] *[[:en:426|426]] *[[:en:486|486]] *[[:en:546|546]] *[[:en:606|606]] *[[:en:666|666]] *[[:en:726|726]] *[[:en:786|786]] *[[:en:846|846]] *[[:en:906|906]] *[[:en:966|966]] | *[[:en:1026|1026]] *[[:en:1086|1086]] *[[:en:1146|1146]] *[[:en:1206|1206]] *[[:en:1266|1266]] *[[:en:1326|1326]] *[[:en:1386|1386]] *[[:en:1446|1446]] *[[:en:1506|1506]] *[[:en:1566|1566]] *[[:en:1626|1626]] *[[:en:1686|1686]] *[[:en:1746|1746]] *[[:en:1806|1806]] *[[:en:1866|1866]] *[[:en:1926|1926]] *[[:en:1986|1986]] | *[[:en:2046|2046]] *[[:en:2106|2106]] *[[:en:2166|2166]] *[[:en:2226|2226]] *[[:en:2286|2286]] *[[:en:2346|2346]] *[[:en:2406|2406]] *[[:en:2466|2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[:en:2706|2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[:en:2946|2946]] |}
==Months of Yang Fire Tiger== The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q767248]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}} markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q767248]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}} markdown {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: Heiin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongin (병인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
<!-- == * Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのえとら (hinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: へいかのとら (heika-no-tora) ***Onyomi: へいいん (heiin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Tiger== A year is classified as Heiin if its [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:6|6]] *[[:en:66|66]] *[[:en:126|126]] *[[:en:186|186]] *[[:en:246|246]] *[[:en:306|306]] *[[:en:366|366]] *[[:en:426|426]] *[[:en:486|486]] *[[:en:546|546]] *[[:en:606|606]] *[[:en:666|666]] *[[:en:726|726]] *[[:en:786|786]] *[[:en:846|846]] *[[:en:906|906]] *[[:en:966|966]] | *[[:en:1026|1026]] *[[:en:1086|1086]] *[[:en:1146|1146]] *[[:en:1206|1206]] *[[:en:1266|1266]] *[[:en:1326|1326]] *[[:en:1386|1386]] *[[:en:1446|1446]] *[[:en:1506|1506]] *[[:en:1566|1566]] *[[:en:1626|1626]] *[[:en:1686|1686]] *[[:en:1746|1746]] *[[:en:1806|1806]] *[[:en:1866|1866]] *[[:en:1926|1926]] *[[:en:1986|1986]] | *[[:en:2046|2046]] *[[:en:2106|2106]] *[[:en:2166|2166]] *[[:en:2226|2226]] *[[:en:2286|2286]] *[[:en:2346|2346]] *[[:en:2406|2406]] *[[:en:2466|2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[:en:2706|2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[:en:2946|2946]] |}
==Months of Yang Fire Tiger== The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

--> ==Years of Yang Fire Tiger== A year is classified as Heiin if its [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:6|6]] *[[:en:66|66]] *[[:en:126|126]] *[[:en:186|186]] *[[:en:246|246]] *[[:en:306|306]] *[[:en:366|366]] *[[:en:426|426]] *[[:en:486|486]] *[[:en:546|546]] *[[:en:606|606]] *[[:en:666|666]] *[[:en:726|726]] *[[:en:786|786]] *[[:en:846|846]] *[[:en:906|906]] *[[:en:966|966]] | *[[:en:1026|1026]] *[[:en:1086|1086]] *[[:en:1146|1146]] *[[:en:1206|1206]] *[[:en:1266|1266]] *[[:en:1326|1326]] *[[:en:1386|1386]] *[[:en:1446|1446]] *[[:en:1506|1506]] *[[:en:1566|1566]] *[[:en:1626|1626]] *[[:en:1686|1686]] *[[:en:1746|1746]] *[[:en:1806|1806]] *[[:en:1866|1866]] *[[:en:1926|1926]] *[[:en:1986|1986]] | *[[:en:2046|2046]] *[[:en:2106|2106]] *[[:en:2166|2166]] *[[:en:2226|2226]] *[[:en:2286|2286]] *[[:en:2346|2346]] *[[:en:2406|2406]] *[[:en:2466|2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[:en:2706|2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[:en:2946|2946]] |}
==Months of Yang Fire Tiger== The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Péng-în]][[zh_yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh_min_nan:Péng-în]][[zh_yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-ìng]][[de:Feuer-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de feu]][[hak:Piáng-yìm]][[ja:丙寅]][[ko:병인]][[nds:Füür-Tiger]][[vi:Bính Dần]][[za:Bingjyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-în]][[zh-yue:丙寅]][[zh:丙寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q767248]] Wikidata name: Yang Fire Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Tiger|kanji=丙寅|romaji=hinoe tora|onyomi=heiin|p=bǐngyín|w=ping-yin|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ȵiŋ²¹|y=bing2 jan4|j=bing2 jan4|ci=pɪŋ jɐn²|mc=pæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=praŋ ŋin|qq=}} markdown {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Fire Tiger also known as Heiin''' (丙寅, ひのえとら, へいかのとら, へいいん) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|stems-and-branches]] combinations in the traditional [[:en:Chinese calendar|Chinese calendar]].
It is the third in the sequence of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], following [[乙丑|Otsuchū]] and preceding [[丁卯|Teibō]]. In the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] 丙 represents Yang and Fire, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|branch]] 寅 represents Yang and Wood, forming a [[Five Elements#Mutual Generation|mutual generation (Wood generates Fire)]] relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: Heiin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongin (병인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
<!-- == * Yang Fire Tiger (丙寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのえとら (hinoe-tora) ***Onyomi: へいかのとら (heika-no-tora) ***Onyomi: へいいん (heiin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Dần
--> ==Years of Yang Fire Tiger== A year is classified as Heiin if its [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Western calendar]] year, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 6. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Heiin Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:6|6]] *[[:en:66|66]] *[[:en:126|126]] *[[:en:186|186]] *[[:en:246|246]] *[[:en:306|306]] *[[:en:366|366]] *[[:en:426|426]] *[[:en:486|486]] *[[:en:546|546]] *[[:en:606|606]] *[[:en:666|666]] *[[:en:726|726]] *[[:en:786|786]] *[[:en:846|846]] *[[:en:906|906]] *[[:en:966|966]] | *[[:en:1026|1026]] *[[:en:1086|1086]] *[[:en:1146|1146]] *[[:en:1206|1206]] *[[:en:1266|1266]] *[[:en:1326|1326]] *[[:en:1386|1386]] *[[:en:1446|1446]] *[[:en:1506|1506]] *[[:en:1566|1566]] *[[:en:1626|1626]] *[[:en:1686|1686]] *[[:en:1746|1746]] *[[:en:1806|1806]] *[[:en:1866|1866]] *[[:en:1926|1926]] *[[:en:1986|1986]] | *[[:en:2046|2046]] *[[:en:2106|2106]] *[[:en:2166|2166]] *[[:en:2226|2226]] *[[:en:2286|2286]] *[[:en:2346|2346]] *[[:en:2406|2406]] *[[:en:2466|2466]] *[[2526]] *[[2586]] *[[2646]] *[[:en:2706|2706]] *[[2766]] *[[2826]] *[[2886]] *[[:en:2946|2946]] |}
==Months of Yang Fire Tiger== The first month (January) of a year ending in 4 or 9 in the Western calendar (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|stem]] is [[:en:甲|Kō]] or [[:en:己|Ki]]) is designated as a Heiin month. However, this is based on the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar calendar]] or the [[solar term calendar]], where the month may start from [[:en:Lìchūn|Risshun]] to the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]].
==Days of Yang Fire Tiger== === Rekichū (Lower Section) === Heiin days in the [[Lower Section rekichū]] are as follows: * [[Unlucky Meeting Days]] (for the [[:en:Chinese lunar calendar|lunar]] months of 3 and 9) == See Also == *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}
